description: Presentation-side rigid attachment calibration for first-kit seed meshes. Maps equipment meshes to fighter sockets using deterministic transforms. Full skinning is blocked — no JOINTS/WEIGHTS in source GLBs.
source: Calculated from fighter_mannequin mesh bounds ([-0.62,-0.42,-0.95] to [0.61,0.42,0.95]) and equipment mesh bounds

longsword_to_grip_r.notes: Longsword attached to right grip socket. Yaw=90 degrees aligns the blade (which extends along Z in local space) to extend forward/right for a cutting stance. The scale 0.55 matches the renderer's per-asset scale from the seed manifest (was 0.90 for standalone display).
longsword_to_grip_r.blocker: presentation_rigid_attachment — no skin data. Weapon will not follow hand animation beyond the socket transform.

gambeson_to_torso_front.notes: Gambeson placed on front torso. Scale 0.72 matches the seed manifest's gambeson scale. The gambeson mesh bounds ([-0.75,-0.44,-0.95] to [0.75,0.44,0.95]) are larger than the fighter's torso, so the scale reduces it to fit.
gambeson_to_torso_front.blocker: presentation_rigid_attachment — gambeson will not deform with fighter pose. May clip or float on extreme poses.

witness_stone_ground.notes: Witness stone placed at ground level, slightly behind the fighters. Scale 0.60 from the seed manifest.
